auth.title:
Business Zakat
Calculator
auth.note: All data is stored locally on your device.
auth.err_pass_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.err_exists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.err_not_found: No account found with this email.
dash.title: Your Businesses
dash.empty_desc: Create your first business profile to start calculating zakat.
dash.storage_note: All data is stored in your browser locally. Use the export button on each business to back up your data as a file. Clearing browser data will permanently erase all accounts and business records.
header.title: Business Zakat Calculator
header.subtitle: Shariah-compliant zakat calculation for Moroccan businesses. 2.5% on net zakatable wealth above nisab.
set.title: Calculation settings
set.nisab_hint: Silver nisab is lower and benefits more zakat recipients. Most contemporary scholars recommend silver for business zakat.
set.nisab_value_hint: Update with today's live silver or gold price in dirhams. The pre-filled value is approximate.
ast.title: Zakatable assets
ast.desc: Include all liquid assets held for one full lunar year. Fixed assets like premises and equipment are excluded.
ast.add_cash: + Add bank account or cash balance
lia.title: Deductible liabilities
lia.desc: Deduct short-term debts, taxes owed, and bills due within the year. Long-term loan treatment varies by madhab.
lia.label: Short-term debts & payables
lia.info_2: Tax liabilities (VAT, IS) due this year
lia.info_note: Long-term debt treatment differs by madhab. Verify with a scholar for your specific case.
res.note_text: This calculation follows mainstream Sunni fiqh — 2.5% (1/40th) on net zakatable assets held above nisab for one complete lunar year (hawl). Nisab basis:
res.set_nisab_sub: Return to settings and enter nisab value
footer.text: For guidance only — not a fatwa. Consult a qualified scholar for your specific situation. · Calculations follow AAOIFI and mainstream Sunni fiqh standards.
